overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The character traverses crosswalks, city streets, and covered walkways while surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians.

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position at crosswalk
character crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet intersection, heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and reflective stripes on clothing standing near crosswalk
pedestrian holding umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow utility box mounted on pole with traffic signal
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall vertical pink neon advertisement on building facade
tall futuristic building with illuminated glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked intersection in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The character stands at a crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, then proceeds to walk across the wet pavement. A pedestrian with red hair stands nearby while another walks with an umbrella. The traffic control box is visible on the right, and pink neon signage illuminates the distant buildings.

events.description: character turns left to follow the avenue, leaving the intersection

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the city street, passing under large holographic advertisements

entered.detail: massive horizontal billboard with pink neon border displaying advertisements
modern building with distinctive square teal neon frame on facade
tall palm tree lining the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character turns left onto a downtown avenue lined with palm trees. Large holographic billboards with pink neon accents dominate the skyline ahead. The character passes a modern building featuring a distinctive square teal neon frame on its facade while rain continues to fall on the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with reflective water features

events.description: entering covered walkway area alongside curved building with neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway, observing reflections in the water channel

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: smooth curved concrete building wall with horizontal architectural lines
continuous horizontal cyan neon light strip running along building base
narrow linear water feature reflecting neon lights and building facades

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway alongside a building with a curved concrete facade. A continuous horizontal cyan neon strip illuminates the building base, casting reflections onto a narrow water channel running along the walkway. The overhead structure provides partial shelter from the heavy rain as other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with outdoor restaurant seating

events.description: approaching commercial storefront with outdoor seating area
slowing down while approaching the restaurant entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the outdoor seating area of a restaurant

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the outdoor tables toward the street

entered.detail: wooden tables and benches arranged under covered patio area
glass entrance to restaurant with warm interior lighting
red velvet rope queue barrier with metal posts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a commercial area featuring an outdoor restaurant with tables and benches. The character slows down while approaching the entrance, passing velvet rope barriers. Other pedestrians walk through the area, and digital advertising screens illuminate the background while the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from an open neon intersection into a sheltered pedestrian corridor and finally a commercial plaza. It begins at a crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, moving across wet pavement past pedestrians and pink neon signage. As the character turns left onto a downtown avenue, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees and towering holographic billboards, passing a building accented by a square teal neon frame. The camera then shifts into a semi-covered walkway where a horizontal cyan neon strip reflects off a narrow water channel, providing partial shelter from the heavy rain. Finally, the movement emerges from the cover into a commercial area, slowing down as it passes velvet rope barriers and outdoor restaurant seating under the glow of digital advertising screens.
